query:
-- Time Entries table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS time_entries (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  workerId INT NOT NULL,
  chargeCodeId INT NOT NULL,
  timesheetId INT,
  entryDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  hoursWorked DECIMAL(5, 2) NOT NULL,
  overtimeHours DECIMAL(5, 2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  description TEXT,
  taskReference VARCHAR(100),
  projectId INT,
  isBillable BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  billingRate DECIMAL(10, 2),
  status ENUM('draft', 'submitted', 'approved', 'rejected', 'invoiced') DEFAULT 'draft' NOT NULL,
  rejectionReason TEXT,
  approvedBy INT,
  approvedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  clockInTime TIMESTAMP NULL,
  clockOutTime TIMESTAMP NULL,
  breakMinutes INT DEFAULT 0,
  location VARCHAR(255),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Timesheets table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS timesheets (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  workerId INT NOT NULL,
  periodStart TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  periodEnd TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  periodType ENUM('weekly', 'biweekly', 'semimonthly', 'monthly') DEFAULT 'biweekly' NOT NULL,
  totalRegularHours DECIMAL(6, 2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  totalOvertimeHours DECIMAL(6, 2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  totalBillableHours DECIMAL(6, 2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  totalNonBillableHours DECIMAL(6, 2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  status ENUM('draft', 'submitted', 'pending_approval', 'approved', 'rejected', 'processed') DEFAULT 'draft' NOT NULL,
  submittedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  submittedBy INT,
  workerSignature TEXT,
  workerSignedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Timesheet Approvals table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS timesheet_approvals (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  timesheetId INT NOT NULL,
  approverId INT NOT NULL,
  approverRole ENUM('supervisor', 'department_head', 'finance', 'admin') NOT NULL,
  approvalLevel INT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  action ENUM('approved', 'rejected', 'returned_for_revision') NOT NULL,
  comments TEXT,
  approverSignature TEXT,
  actionAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Charge Code Budgets table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS charge_code_budgets (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  chargeCodeId INT NOT NULL,
  fiscalYear INT NOT NULL,
  fiscalPeriod INT,
  budgetedHours DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL,
  budgetedAmount DECIMAL(15, 2) NOT NULL,
  actualHours DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  actualAmount DECIMAL(15, 2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  variance DECIMAL(15, 2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  lastUpdated TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Time Off Requests table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS time_off_requests (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  workerId INT NOT NULL,
  requestType ENUM('pto', 'sick', 'personal', 'bereavement', 'jury_duty', 'military', 'unpaid', 'other') NOT NULL,
  startDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  endDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  totalHours DECIMAL(6, 2) NOT NULL,
  reason TEXT,
  status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  approvedBy INT,
  approvedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  rejectionReason TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Contractor Invoices table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contractor_invoices (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  workerId INT NOT NULL,
  invoiceNumber VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  periodStart TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  periodEnd TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  totalHours DECIMAL(8, 2) NOT NULL,
  totalAmount DECIMAL(15, 2) NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('draft', 'submitted', 'under_review', 'approved', 'paid', 'disputed') DEFAULT 'draft' NOT NULL,
  submittedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  approvedBy INT,
  approvedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  paidAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  paymentReference VARCHAR(100),
  notes TEXT,
  attachmentUrl TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Invoice Line Items table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS invoice_line_items (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  invoiceId INT NOT NULL,
  chargeCodeId INT NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  hours DECIMAL(6, 2) NOT NULL,
  rate DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL,
  amount DECIMAL(15, 2) NOT NULL
);
